message:
fix(engine): clippy lint remediation across 45 source modules

Systematic cleanup driven by cargo clippy -D warnings:

- Replace vec![...] with fixed-size array literals [...] where the
  collection size is known at compile time (most files)
- Remove redundant 1 * FP_SCALE multiplications in stdlib.rs
  (-1 * FP_SCALE -> -FP_SCALE)
- Add underscores to hex literals for readability
  (0xcbf29ce484222325 -> 0xcbf2_9ce4_8422_2325)
- Remove unnecessary .clone() calls on Copy types
- Fix other minor clippy warnings (needless borrows, redundant
  closures, etc.)

Touches: assumptions_ledger, claim_entitlement, closure_model,
counterfactual_evaluator, counterfactual_replay_engine, cross_repo_contract,
declassification_pipeline, delegate_cell_harness, deterministic_replay,
dp_budget_accountant, engine_object_id, entropy_evidence_compressor,
feature_parity_tracker, flow_envelope, gc_pause, governance_scorecard,
hybrid_lane_router, key_attestation, law_mining, marker_stream,
module_cache, moonshot_contract, obstruction_certificate, one_lever_policy,
opportunity_matrix, optimal_stopping, parser_arena, parser_error_recovery,
policy_checkpoint, governance_audit_ledger, proof_release_gate,
proof_schema, quarantine_mesh_gate, replacement_lineage_log,
runtime_hotspot_optimization_campaign, safety_decision_router,
security_conformance, signature_preimage, stage_envelope_certificate,
stdlib, swarm_control_loop, synthesis_budget, version_matrix_lane,
wasm_runtime_lane, adversarial_coevolution_harness

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
